title: rubus hedycarpus var. pubescens
intro: Rubus hedycarpus var. pubescens, also known as the Himalayan blackberry or Himalayan raspberry, is a thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus hedycarpus var. pubescens include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
